allow: Bash(npm install @anthropic-ai/sdk better-auth @prisma/client docx lucide-react react-markdown)
Bash(npx shadcn@latest add card table badge button tabs tooltip progress sheet input label separator skeleton dropdown-menu avatar -y)
Bash(node -e "const a = require\(''@anthropic-ai/sdk''\); const c = new a.default\({apiKey:''test''}\); console.log\(Object.keys\(c\).filter\(k => typeof c[k] === ''object''\).join\('', ''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const a = require\(''@anthropic-ai/sdk''\); const c = new a.default\({apiKey:''test''}\); console.log\(''beta keys:'', Object.keys\(c.beta\)\); if\(c.beta.files\) console.log\(''files keys:'', Object.keys\(c.beta.files\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const a = require\(''@anthropic-ai/sdk''\); const c = new a.default\({apiKey:''test''}\); const proto = Object.getPrototypeOf\(c.beta.files\); console.log\(''prototype methods:'', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(proto\).filter\(n => n !== ''constructor''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const a = require\(''@anthropic-ai/sdk''\); const c = new a.default\({apiKey:''test''}\); const proto = Object.getPrototypeOf\(c.beta.files\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(proto\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const a = require\(''@anthropic-ai/sdk''\); const c = new a.default\({apiKey:''test''}\); console.log\(c.beta.files.upload.toString\(\).substring\(0, 300\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const a = require\(''@anthropic-ai/sdk''\); const c = new a.default\({apiKey:''test''}\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(c.beta.messages\)\).filter\(n => n !== ''constructor''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const a = require\(''@anthropic-ai/sdk''\); const c = new a.default\({apiKey:''test''}\); const p = Object.getPrototypeOf\(c.beta.messages\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(p\)\)")
